## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the end of GrowthX Labs' engagement with Swoogo and plan the transition.](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Swoogo is ending GrowthX Labs' engagement in a month, driven by internal changes and desire to bring content creation in-house](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [GrowthX has completed all planned content; final week's articles (10) to be shared via email](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Transition plan: GrowthX to provide final Airtable export of all content (225+ articles)](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual appreciation and left door open for future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

## Topics

### Recent Swoogo Report Launch

  - [Survey of 500 event organizers on 2025 trends/challenges](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Used Typeform for data collection (Nov-Dec)](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Rebecca & Mitchel still coming down from launch anxiety](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

### Reasons for Ending Engagement

  - [Swoogo building out internal team for content/blog writing](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Desire to better align SEO efforts with broader content/brand strategy](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Possible miscommunication on focus areas (event registration, management)](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Timing of specific content creation didn't meet expectations](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Swoogo hiring for new roles, testing in-house content creation](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Content Performance & Future Potential

  - [Clicks/impressions improving, with traffic from Sept/Oct content](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Recent experiments show promise for 3-5x click increase in some areas](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Prateek highlighted untapped potential in programmatic SEO (1000+ article opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Transition Planning

  - [GrowthX to finish any in-progress work](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [No new content planned beyond this week's 10 articles](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Prateek to email final 10 articles directly to Rebecca](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide comprehensive Airtable export of all 225+ articles](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Access Issues

  - [GrowthX's access to Search Console revoked, limiting performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [CMS access needed for any final article publishing](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to email 10 final articles to Rebecca](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare and send comprehensive Airtable export of all content](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Swoogo to handle internal transition for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Potential future reconnection for programmatic SEO collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/spJVQ3N5D_zBhQfbNFPFUa9mS1QL7znB?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
